allow: PowerShell(cd c:\\programming\\SentryKey\\companion; .\\gradlew.bat processReleaseManifest --console=plain 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5 | Out-String; "=== REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES in merged RELEASE manifest? ==="; $m = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Path app\\build -Filter AndroidManifest.xml -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match 'release' } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($m\) { if \(Select-String -Path $m.FullName -Pattern 'REQUEST_INSTALL_PACKAGES' -Quiet\) { "FOUND \(bad\)" } else { "absent \(good\): $\($m.FullName\)" } } else { "no release manifest found" })
